ItacAcademyItem.Name: Concordi-Ferrara (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the Concordi Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Matthaei Stuffii Viennensis n. Austrii p. IV quiritium auditoris Academiae Concordum principis Methodica in divina philosophia, utroque iure, & communi nature speculatione; theoremata, in almo Ferrariensi gymnasio disputanda, proposita ad serenissimum Alphonsum II Atestinum magnum Ferrariae ducem. (Ferrariae: typis Victorij Baldinj, 1581).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
